keyPoints: Water Pollution: Industrial effluent, agricultural runoff, sewage release
Noise Pollution: Construction sites, traffic, loudspeaker
Air Pollution: Vehicle emissions, industrial activities, biomass burning
sources: Water Pollution: Industrial effluent, agricultural runoff, sewage release
Noise Pollution: Construction sites, traffic, loudspeaker
Air Pollution: Vehicle emissions, industrial activities, biomass burning
impacts: Water Pollution: Eutrophication, water-borne diseases, loss of biodiversity
Noise Pollution: Hearing loss, stress, sleep disorders
Air Pollution: Respiratory diseases, cardiovascular diseases, cancer
preventiveMeasures: Water Pollution: Implement industrial effluent treatment, promote sustainable agriculture
Noise Pollution: Implement noise regulations, use noise-reducing materials
Air Pollution: Promote clean energy, implement emission controls, plant more trees
publicHealthAspects: Water Pollution: Water-borne diseases, cancer, reproductive issues
Noise Pollution: Hearing loss, stress, sleep disorders
Air Pollution: Respiratory diseases, cardiovascular diseases, cancer
